zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Davey於1520年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛可利時，她的父親Sir John Davey26歲，母親Margaret Briston30歲。她於1543年與Robert Griggs在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1547年12月6日在她的家鄉享年27歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛可利聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Davey于1520年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可布洛可利时，她的父亲Sir John Davey26岁，母亲Margaret Briston30岁。她于1543年与Robert Griggs在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1547年12月6日在她的家乡享年27岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可布洛可利聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Davey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the personal name Davy, originally an Old French vernacular form of the Biblical name David which became the most common form of the name in medieval England.

variants.name: Davy
meanings: Irish (Sligo): adopted name for Mac Daibhéid ‘son of David’, see McDevitt .
French and Breton: from a vernacular form of the personal name   David  .

variants.name: Davee
meanings: Altered form of English   Davey   or Scottish   Davie  .

variants.name: David
meanings: Jewish, Welsh, Scottish, English, French, Breton, Portuguese, Czech, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Dávid), Slovak (mainly Dávid): from the Hebrew personal name David (in Hungarian and Slovak spelled Dávid), interpreted as ‘beloved’. The name has been perennially popular among Jews, in honor of the Biblical king of this name. His prominence, and the vivid narrative of his life contained in the First Book of Samuel, led to adoption of the name among Christians in the Middle Ages in various parts of Europe. In Britain, the popularity of this as a personal name was increased for two reasons. Firstly by virtue of its being the name of the patron saint of Wales who was abbot-bishop in the 6th century at what became known as Saint David's in Pembrokeshire. There are numerous dedications and placenames honouring the saint in south Wales, and it is no coincidence that the modern surname is heavily concentrated there, especially in Glamorgan. Secondly, the name was borne by two kings of Scotland (David I, reigning 1124–53, and David II, 1329–71). Its popularity in Russia is largely due to the fact that this was the ecclesiastical name adopted by Saint Gleb (died 1015), one of two sons of Prince Vladimir of Kiev who were martyred for their Christian zeal. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from some other languages, especially Assyrian/Chaldean Dawid and Arabic Daud (with variants, such as Daoud and Dawood ).

History: Guillaume David from France married Marie Armand in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1656. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Davey was born in 1520, in Brockley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Davey, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Briston, was 30. She married Robert Griggs in 1543, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 6 December 1547, in her hometown, at the age of 27, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Brockley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Davey est née en 1520, à Brockley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Davey, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Briston, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Griggs en 1543, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 décembre 1547, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à St Andrew's Church, Brockley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Saint Andrew's Church, Brockley, Saint E: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브록리 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Joane Davey(이)가 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브록리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Davey(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Briston(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1543년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Robert Griggs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1547년 12월 6일 그녀의 고향에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브록리 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Davey родилась в 1520 г. в местности броккли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Davey было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Briston, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Griggs в 1543 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 декабря 1547 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности ст андрю'с чурч, броккли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
